name: Fantasy Vore RPG
description:
An RPG where you can get vored by various fantasy monsters (mechanics inspired by Mindbreak RPG)

If the bot miscalculates something or says a roll fails when it should succeed (or vice versa), either edit the message or generate a new one, where it might fix itself

Latest Update: Added Giant Frog

Monster List (planning on adding more, leave a review for any monster requests)

1 - Giant Snake

2 - Lamia

3 - Slime

4 - Slime Girl

5 - Mimic

6 - Mermaid

7 - Fairy

8 - Giant Spider

9 - Arachne

10 - Dragon

11 - Giant Frog
creator: HistoricalHello12
